titles.title: Seitokai ni mo Ana wa Aru!
There Is Also a Hole in the Student Organization!

data.title: Seitokai ni mo Ana wa Aru!
title_synonyms: There Is Also a Hole in the Student Organization!
data.synopsis:
Ume Mizunoe, a first-year student at the prestigious Fujinari Academy, excels in Japanese literature but struggles so badly in science that his chances of advancing are at risk. Hoping to boost his academic record, he joins the student council—only to find himself surrounded by a cast of quirky characters: a charismatic yet secretly shy president, a kind but intimidating treasurer, an adorably cheeky boy, and a tiny, stray-cat-like secretary.

Thrown into a whirlwind of chaotic daily life, Ume's school days are about to get a lot more unpredictable—and a lot more lively!

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: "Omae Gotoki ga Maou ni Kateru to Omouna" to Yuusha Party wo Tsuihou sareta node, Outo de Kimama ni Kurashitai
Do You Think Someone Like You Can Defeat the Demon King?
Roll Over and Die: I Will Fight for an Ordinary Life with My Love and Cursed Sword!
「お前ごときが魔王に勝てると思うな」と勇者パーティを追放されたので、王都で気ままに暮らしたい

data.title: "Omae Gotoki ga Maou ni Kateru to Omouna" to Yuusha Party wo Tsuihou sareta node, Outo de Kimama ni Kurashitai
data.title_japanese: 「お前ごときが魔王に勝てると思うな」と勇者パーティを追放されたので、王都で気ままに暮らしたい
title_synonyms: Do You Think Someone Like You Can Defeat the Demon King?
Roll Over and Die: I Will Fight for an Ordinary Life with My Love and Cursed Sword!
data.synopsis:
Chosen by the Church's god, Origin, a young country girl named Flum Apricot is enlisted in the hero's party and expected to fight demons. However, her one innate skill, Reversal, has no practical use, and the party's sage, Jean Inteige, treats her as a burden, eventually selling her off to a slave dealer.

In the slave dealer's dark dungeon, all hope seems lost. But in a moment of desperation, Flum discovers that her skill actually turns the negative energy of cursed weapons into power, which helps her slay the slave owner and escape with another captured girl, Milkit. Now equipped with the means to fight and survive, Flum embraces the career of an adventurer and aims to lead a happy life with Milkit, away from the grim machinations of the Church.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Huangshen Lu: Linglong Shan
data.synopsis:
It tells a story set in the world of the ancient Chinese classic "Classic of Mountains and Seas," showcasing the timeless bond between the two male protagonists, Xiaoyu and his apprentice Tianyi. 

(Source: Tencent, translated)

titles.title: Wangzhe Rongyao: Rongyao Zhi Zhang - Mingyun Pian
Honor of Kings: Chapter of Glory - Destiny Arc
王者荣耀：荣耀之章 命运篇

data.title: Wangzhe Rongyao: Rongyao Zhi Zhang - Mingyun Pian
data.title_japanese: 王者荣耀：荣耀之章 命运篇
title_synonyms: Honor of Kings: Chapter of Glory - Destiny Arc
data.synopsis:
Kain and Luna were born into the Moon Clan of Sea City, siblings who relied on each other since childhood. During Luna's coronation ceremony as clan leader, a powerful force belonging to the family curse erupted, killing everyone present except Kain. Kain was thus hunted by the Judges and forced to flee Sea City. On his escape, he met the mercenary Kuang Tie and together they journey to the Divine Realm to challenge the gods...

(Source: Tencent, translated)

titles.title: Ano Hoshi ni Kimi ga Iru

data.title: I Byeol-e Pil-yohan
title_synonyms: Ano Hoshi ni Kimi ga Iru
data.synopsis:
Nan-young is a scientist whose astronaut mom failed to return to Earth when things went awry during her Mars probe. Nan-young has always dreamed of exploring space too and longs to go to Mars in hopes of finding a trace of her mom.

Her dream comes true when she is selected as one of the astronauts for a Mars probe project. Before she blasts off though, she meets Jay, a musician who also fixes retro sound instruments. It's all thanks to an old turntable that Nan-young inherited from her mom.

(Source: Netflix, edited)

titles.title: 时光代理人 第三季

data.title: Shiguang Dailiren III
title_synonyms: 时光代理人 第三季
data.synopsis:
After the Li Tianchen incident came to a close, Time Photo Studio returned to a superficial peace. However, the news of Xia Fei's disappearance once again drew everyone into a crossroads of fate. With Vein's return and Qiao Ling's awakening of her superpowers, Cheng Xiaoshi and Lu Guang gradually uncover the secrets of the Bahati fire case, and Cheng Xiaoshi's father, Cheng Weimin, and mother, Shao Yuanyuan, also seem to have intricate connections to it. As the investigation deepens, Liu Xiao from a mysterious organization begins his operation, and the intervention of Yingdu police officer Jae further complicates this pursuit of the truth...

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

titles.title: Hell Teacher: Jigoku Sensei Nube Part 2

data.title: Jigoku Sensei Nube (2025) Part 2
data.title_english: Hell Teacher: Jigoku Sensei Nube Part 2
data.synopsis:
Meisuke "Nube" Nueno, a teacher at Doumori Elementary School and expert in the occult, finds it increasingly difficult to protect his students against dark forces. After one of his students is sent to a parallel world, Nube encounters an unusual spirit that sends him back in time to change one regretful event.

Although Nube manages to fix the situation, this succession of unlikely events suggests that a more serious menace may be threatening the peace of Doumori. To protect everyone he holds dear, Nube will have to overcome the demons of his past and uncover the nature of the looming supernatural danger.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Jigoku Sensei Nube (2025) Part 2 aired on TV Asahi's IMAnimation W block.

data.title: Ke Jin Wanjia
data.synopsis:
Chu Yi, a young man born with a silver spoon in his mouth, predicted the apocalypse where game gear merged with reality and decided to join the game with 30 billion. Thus, he became the Mighty Whale, Chu Tiange, in the game The Era. With his abundant fortune, Chu Tiange managed to get the fanciest gear, the most powerful weapons, and the class with the most advantages. For other players, Chu Tiange is a walking Boss disguised as a player. And for the Bosses, Chu Tiange is the mighty and fearsome Archaean Dragonking. The future might be unavoidable, and the barrier between reality and the virtual world might be brought down eventually, yet Chu Tiange will reverse the apocalypse and control the whole new era in the name of the Dragonking.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Yuan Zun: Nian Fan
data.synopsis:
Having his dragon destiny stolen, he refused to accept his fate. He performed a blood sacrifice to open his eight meridians, ascends to the peak to terrify his nemesis, and the Holy Dragon Emperor will eventually rise.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

data.title: Ye Wujiang
data.synopsis:
In the eternal night, a young man shatters the shackles of fate, defies all gods and demons, and forges a new legend of fantasy with a passionate battle song!

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Chen Dong's (辰东) web novel of the same title.
